scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=packages/server & npm run dev --workspace=packages/client
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/server && npm run build --workspace=packages/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/server && npm run lint --workspace=packages/client
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace=packages/server && npm run lint:fix --workspace=packages/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/server && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/client
